steps.title: Recognize that initial height occurs at t = 0
steps.content: The object is kicked from a platform at time $t = 0$. To find the initial height, we evaluate the height equation at the moment of launch.

steps.title: Evaluate the value h at t = 0
steps.content:
Substitute $t = 0$ into $h = -4.9t^2 + 7t + 9$:

$$h = -4.9(0)^2 + 7(0) + 9 = 9$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
